name: Giant Council
summary: Storm Giant-led central governing institution of the Soreheim Alliance.
day_to_day: Issues decrees, hears strategic reports, assigns regional priorities, and adjudicates major disputes.
who_works_there: Council members, giant aides, regional envoys, planners, guarded clerks.
who_uses_it: Regional leaders, industrial bodies, military commanders, petitioners of extraordinary rank.
authority: Ultimate Alliance authority over law, labor expectation, and strategic direction.
public_manifestation: Council announcements, quota shifts, giant escorts, festival recognition or punishment.
conflict_or_bottleneck: Distance from common life makes the Council powerful but vulnerable to blind spots and delegated abuse.
